actions.name: deleteAiSkill

properties.description: The ID of the AI skill to delete.
properties.label: ID
properties.name: id

actions.title: Delete AI Skill

actions.description: Removes a single file from an existing AI skill archive.
actions.name: removeFileFromAiSkill

properties.description: The ID of the AI skill to remove the file from.
properties.label: ID
properties.name: id

properties.description: The path of the file to remove within the skill archive.
properties.label: Path
properties.name: path

actions.title: Remove File from AI Skill

actions.description: Updates an AI skill. Provide name/description to rename the skill, or files to update archive contents.
actions.name: updateAiSkill

properties.description: The ID of the AI skill to update.
properties.label: ID
properties.name: id

properties.description: New name for the skill. Required when updating name or description.
properties.label: Name
properties.name: name

properties.description: New description for the skill.
properties.label: Description
properties.name: description

properties.description: File contents to update inside the skill archive. Each entry replaces the file at the given path
File path inside the skill archive. SKILL.md is the root file.
properties.label: Path
properties.name: path

properties.description: New text content for the file.
properties.label: Content
properties.name: content

properties.label: Files
properties.name: files

actions.title: Update AI Skill

clusterElements.name: fileSystemTools
clusterElements.description: Read, write, and edit files with precise control.
clusterElements.title: File System Tools

clusterElements.name: shellTools
clusterElements.description: Execute shell commands with timeout control, background process management, and regex output filtering.
clusterElements.title: Shell Tools

clusterElements.name: grepTool
clusterElements.description: Pure Java grep implementation for code search with regex, glob filtering, and multiple output modes.
clusterElements.title: Grep Tool

clusterElements.name: globTool
clusterElements.description: Fast file pattern matching tool for finding files by name patterns with glob syntax.
clusterElements.title: Glob Tool

clusterElements.name: smartWebFetchTool
clusterElements.description: AI-powered web content summarization with caching.
clusterElements.title: Smart Web Fetch Tool

clusterElements.name: braveWebSearchTool
clusterElements.description: Web search with domain filtering using the Brave Search API.
clusterElements.title: Brave Web Search Tool

clusterElements.name: todoWriteTool
clusterElements.description: Structured task management with state tracking.
clusterElements.title: Todo Write Tool

clusterElements.name: taskTool
clusterElements.description: Delegate complex tasks to specialized sub-agents for parallel execution.
clusterElements.title: Task Tool
